SEARCH

Uses of Enum Class
common.dto.ParamField

Packages that use ParamField
Package
Description
client.service
Client service layer: a typed facade over the raw connection.
client.view
Client JavaFX controllers and view helpers — one controller per FXML screen (login, dashboard, reservations, gate, reports, approval queue, notifications, registration, …) plus shared UI utilities such as BaseController and Widgets.
common.dto
Serializable data transfer objects and enums shared by client and server.
server.control
Server business logic: the controllers and services that implement GoNature's use cases.
server.dao
Data access layer: one DAO per aggregate (auth, members, parks, reservations, visits, waiting list, notifications, reports, parameter-change requests).

    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.requestParamChange(ParamField field, int newValue)
    Submits a park-parameter change request (PARK_MANAGER only).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private int
    ParkController.currentValue(ParkDTO park, ParamField field)
    Reads a park's current value for the given parameter field — the old_value recorded on a change request.

    Method
    Description

    Maps a ParamField to its park column name.
    int
    ParameterChangeDAO.insertRequest(int parkId, int requestedBy, ParamField field, int oldValue, int newValue)
    Inserts a new change request in the PENDING state, stamping created_at with the current time.
    void
    ParkDAO.updateField(int parkId, ParamField field, int newValue)
    Writes a new value to a single park parameter column.
